2021-22 Wichita State Shockers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-13 (6-9, 7th in AAC MBB)

Coach: Isaac Brown

PS/G: 68.5 (248th of 358)

PA/G: 66.4 (90th of 358)

SRS: 8.11 (80th of 358)

SOS: 6.00 (78th of 358)

ORtg: 99.6 (251st of 358)

DRtg: 96.5 (78th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +8000
